title: Stanley Martin Homes Opens New Community in Sherrills Ford
summary: Stanley Martin Homes celebrates the grand opening of Essence at Laurelbrook, its first ESSENCE BY STANLEY MARTIN™ community in the Charlotte market.
charlotte_impact: Signals growth in the Charlotte housing market and provides new residential options for potential homeowners.

title: Trump Misstates Facts in Charlotte Stabbing Case
summary: Trump incorrectly claims the suspect in a Charlotte stabbing was an immigrant who "came through open borders," when the suspect is a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the spread of misinformation and its potential impact on public perception of immigration issues.

title: Swimming Pool Filter Maker Has Large Plant in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a Charlotte-based company, is the largest private employer in Clemmons, NC, with over 1,000 workers.

title: Florence Airport Passengers Increased in 2025

title: Women Tortured and Killed Girl in Charlotte, NC
summary: Three women are charged with the child abuse death of Dominique Moody, who was allegedly tortured and kept in a dog crate at a Charlotte home.
